_description: Supernatural Entity Character Sheet Template - For unique supernatural beings (constructs, spirits, jinn, etc.)
template_usage: Fill this template and import with: php tools/repeatable/php/database-tools/import_supernatural_entities.php path/to/this_file.json. character_name is required. This template handles entities that don't fit other categories.

_field_documentation.entity_type: STRING - Type of entity (Construct, Spirit, Jinn, Elemental, etc.)
_field_documentation.entity_subtype: STRING - More specific type (Golem, Tupilaq, Ifrit, etc.)
_field_documentation.power_pool: OBJECT - Entity's power source (Essence, Quintessence, Mana, etc.)
_field_documentation.special_abilities: ARRAY - Unique abilities specific to this entity type
_field_documentation.immunities: ARRAY - What cannot harm this entity
_field_documentation.vulnerabilities: ARRAY - What can harm or destroy this entity
